scenarios.description: setTrackPosition(true) sets trackPosition to true and returns the same Parser instance
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Parser instance is the same as the caller and isTrackPosition() returns true
pseudocode: TEST TC01 setTrackPosition enables position tracking

scenarios.description: setTrackPosition(false) sets trackPosition to false and returns the same Parser instance
scenarios.precondition: Parser initially may have trackPosition true or false
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Parser instance is the same as the caller and isTrackPosition() returns false
pseudocode: TEST TC02 setTrackPosition disables position tracking
